place: Layan, Choeng Thale, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
title: Layan Verde — 4-Bedroom Sea-View Penthouse with Private Pool
blurb: A 528.23 m² four-bedroom sea-view residence at Layan Verde, the eco-inspired forest resort in Phuket's Layan–Bang Tao hills. Four en-suite bedrooms open to two terraces totalling around 90 m², a 35.5 m² private pool, a garden and a sauna, framing sea and private-pool views. Luxury furniture package and freehold included; off-plan, completing Q4 2028.
detail:
A signature top-level residence within Layan Verde — the eco-inspired, self-sufficient forest resort set into the lush Layan–Bang Tao hills, roughly 1.1 km from Layan Beach. Spanning 528.23 m², this four-bedroom residence (Building A4, unit A4-101) is laid out around a generous open-plan living room and kitchen that flow onto two terraces of about 26.6 m² and 63.3 m² — close to 90 m² of outdoor living — with a 35.5 m² private pool, a landscaped garden and a private sauna oriented to capture sea and pool views.

All four bedrooms are en-suite, ranging from roughly 16 to 27 m², with a powder room, walk-in wardrobe, a dedicated maid's room with its own bathroom, and a storage/laundry room completing a layout built for family living or premium rental. Interiors pair warm timber, travertine and soft sage tones with floor-to-ceiling glazing, delivered to a high standard with an optional fully furnished package.

Ownership extends the full Layan Verde resort lifestyle — signature restaurants and an ocean club, spa, onsen and sauna, fitness centres, rooftop and lap pools, kids' clubs, coworking spaces, padel and squash courts and more — with a loyalty programme of dining, spa and activity privileges across the complex. Off-plan, with completion scheduled for Q4 2028.

Current quote: the apartment is priced at ฿132,215,969, with a luxury furniture package included (worth ฿6,866,990) and freehold registration included — a fully inclusive ฿144,365,259. It can be reserved on a 35% instalment plan: a ฿400,000 reservation fee (0.3%), the balance of roughly 35% within 14 days, then five payments of 13% at six-month intervals through to completion on 31 December 2028. Owners automatically join the VillaCarte / Layan Green Park loyalty programme, with 15–25% privileges across the resort's dining, spa, fitness, kids' club and transfer services.
